name: commitment_number_present
expression: commitment_number IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(commitment_number)) > 0
description: commitment_number is required for Title Commitment extraction.

name: commitment_date_present
expression: commitment_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(commitment_date)) > 0
description: commitment_date is required for Title Commitment extraction.

name: title_company_name_present
expression: title_company_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(title_company_name)) > 0
description: title_company_name is required for Title Commitment extraction.

name: property_address_present
expression: property_address IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(property_address)) > 0
description: property_address is required for Title Commitment extraction.

name: legal_description_present
expression: legal_description IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(legal_description)) > 0
description: legal_description is required for Title Commitment extraction.

name: policy_amount_non_negative
description: policy_amount should be non-negative when present.
